## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Bash as bash
    participant Env as Environment
    participant Runner as python-lambda-local
    participant Script as get_user_watched_containers.py
    participant Event as user_watched_container_get.json
    Bash->>Bash: echo "locations get"
    Bash->>Env: set PYTHONPATH=/home/fvlinux/.../application_service
    Bash->>Env: export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:/home/fvlinux/.../common/fv/python
    Bash->>Runner: start with AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1, AWS_STAGE=dev, AWS_PROFILE=default and args -f lambda_handler -t 120
    Runner->>Script: load and import module
    Runner->>Event: read event JSON
    Runner->>Script: call lambda_handler(event)
    Script-->>Runner: return response/result
    Runner-->>Bash: process exit
```
